_comment: Power-user tuning starter. Copy to configs/tuning.local.json (gitignored) to customize per-machine. Any field you don't set falls through to the Go default in DefaultConfig(). The CAMBRIAN_* env-var convention (CAMBRIAN_EXECUTION__EWMA_ALPHA) overrides this file. See README 'Configuration Reference' for the full list of tunables. Curated, NOT a full mirror of all hyperparameters — new fields added to DefaultConfig() will just work because they are not pinned here.
